summary: Firebase Push Notifications fix verified. All FCM backend endpoints working correctly. Frontend loads, login works, chat displays messages. Service Worker (firebase-messaging-sw.js) is properly configured without AudioContext or conflicting push listeners.
seed_data_creation: Test FCM tokens created with 'test_' prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: FCM push notification fixes verified. Backend FCM endpoints all working. Service Worker properly configured. Note: Actual push notification delivery cannot be tested in headless Chrome but all infrastructure is in place.

app_loads_correctly.details: Loading screen shows 'Initializing Trading Platform...', then transitions to login page

login_with_admin_credentials.details: Login with admin/admin123 works correctly, redirects to chat

chat_tab_loads.details: Chat tab displays messages with timestamps, online users list visible

fcm_status_endpoint.details: GET /api/fcm/status returns {initialized: true, credentials_configured: false, registered_tokens: N}

fcm_register_token_endpoint.details: POST /api/fcm/register-token successfully registers and updates tokens

fcm_test_notification_endpoint.details: POST /api/fcm/test-notification returns appropriate response (success:false for invalid tokens is expected)

firebase_messaging_sw_served.details: GET /firebase-messaging-sw.js returns valid service worker with Firebase messaging, no AudioContext, no conflicting push listener

no_breaking_js_errors.details: Console shows '[FCM] Firebase messaging initialized' and 'Service Worker registered successfully'. Only minor React warning about non-boolean attribute (not breaking)

fcm_fix_verification.audiocontext_removed: VERIFIED - firebase-messaging-sw.js does not contain AudioContext
fcm_fix_verification.conflicting_push_listener_removed: VERIFIED - No self.addEventListener('push') in service worker
fcm_fix_verification.firebase_messaging_initialized: VERIFIED - Console shows '[FCM] Firebase messaging initialized'
